name: mishkat
title: Mishkat al-Masabih
author: Imam al-Khatib al-Tabrizi
description: A comprehensive hadith collection compiled from multiple authentic sources.

books.name: Faith
books.description: Fundamental teachings on faith (Iman), its branches, and matters of belief in Allah, His Angels, Books, Messengers, and the Last Day.

books.name: Knowledge
books.description: The virtues of seeking Islamic knowledge, the etiquette of a student, and the responsibility of scholars to convey the truth.

books.name: Purification
books.description: Comprehensive rulings on Taharah, including all forms of ritual purity required for acts of worship.

books.name: Prayer
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: Funerals
books.description: Instructions on washing, shrouding, praying over, and burying the deceased, as well as mourning etiquette.

books.name: Zakat
books.description: Comprehensive guide to the obligatory almsgiving (Zakat), detailing who must pay, allowable recipients, and calculable wealth types.

books.name: Fasting
books.description: Regulations regarding obligatory fasting during Ramadan and voluntary fasts throughout the year.

books.name: The Excellent Qualities of the Qur'an
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Supplications
books.description: The texts and virtues of calling upon Allah (Du'a) in various situations.

books.name: The Rites of Pilgrimage
books.description: Complete rites and spiritual significance of the major pilgrimage to Mecca (Hajj).

books.name: Business Transactions
books.description: Islamic commercial law, including permissible trade, prohibited transactions, and business ethics.

books.name: Inheritance and Wills
books.description: The complex and precise distribution of inherited wealth among surviving relatives as ordained in Islam.

books.name: Marriage
books.description: Extensive teachings on the marital contract, domestic harmony, choosing a spouse, and spousal rights.

books.name: Emancipation
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Oaths and Vows
books.description: Rulings on swearing oaths, fulfilling vows, and the expiation required when breaking them.

books.name: Retaliation
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Prescribed Punishments
books.description: The prescribed penalties (Hudud) for major transgressions to preserve societal justice and security.

books.name: The Offices of Commander and Qadi
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Jihad
books.description: The principles of struggle, rules of military engagement, treaties, and the high status of martyrs.

books.name: Game and Animals Which May Be Slaughtered
books.description: Rules regarding lawful hunting practices, use of hunting animals, and slaughtering conditions.

books.name: Foods
books.description: Dietary laws distinguishing lawful (Halal) provisions from unlawful (Haram) foods, and etiquette of eating.

books.name: Clothing
books.description: Islamic guidelines regarding modesty in dress, adornment, prohibitions on certain fabrics, and personal grooming.

books.name: Medicine and Spells
books.description: The Prophetic approach to health, remedies, diseases, and the balance between relying on Allah and seeking treatment.

books.name: Visions
books.description: The significance of dreams, visions, and their interpretations in Islamic tradition.

books.name: Fitan
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Events of the Day of Resurrection and the Beginning of Creation
books.description: Descriptions of the Day of Resurrection, its terrors, the Reckoning, and the ultimate scales of justice.

books.name: Excellent Qualities and Description of the Prophet
books.description: Details covering the noble lineage, physical characteristics, and extraordinary signs (Mu'jizat) of Prophet Muhammad (ﷺ).

books.name: Fine Qualities
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Introduction مقدمة المؤلف
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.
